arts.sum: MIKE KEEGAN: Amorim did not have to wait long to get his first reminder of the task he has taken on at Manchester United when his new charges limped to a 1-1 draw away at Ipswich Town.

arts.ttl: Mo Salah slammed over ‘selfish’ Liverpool contract comments
